milestoneTitle: Phase M9.16i — Tool cards adopt the brighter near-white Learn-panel glass recipe and the current accent tokens. Added .tool-card.glass to the 0.97α top / 0.90α bottom override list. Hover swapped the legacy --accent color-mix for the shared --accent-border + --accent-glow tokens and the heavy 0.75α black shadow for the subtle Learn-panel shadow (10px 24px -14px accent-glow + 4px 14px -6px 0.10 black). tool-card-claude hover keeps its orange --accent-claude-glow but the same lighter shadow recipe. Result: tool catalog reads as a lineage with Dashboard panels instead of a warmer sibling.
